title: Create a new category and verify uniqueness
objective: Verify that a new Category created in Settings is immediately usable and that the system prevents duplicate names.

steps.step: Enter name = 'Pet Care', select an icon and color, tap Save
steps.expected_result: Category 'Pet Care' appears in the categories list

steps.step: Tap Add New again, enter name = 'Pet Care', tap Save
steps.expected_result: System shows 'Name already exists' alert; dialog remains open

steps.step: Open Fast Entry sheet and open the Category picker
steps.expected_result: 'Pet Care' appears in the category list

steps.step: Select 'Pet Care', complete and save the expense
steps.expected_result: Expense saved with Category = 'Pet Care', visible in Timeline
